description_long: This is a tall, menacing banner featuring a tattered red cloth with a large, stylized skull emblem at its center. The banner is suspended from a black, ornate metal pole adorned with sharp, spiked finials at both the top and bottom. Chains connect the upper crossbar to the main pole, adding to its intimidating appearance. The fabric appears weathered and torn, suggesting exposure to the elements or intentional distressing for dramatic effect. The overall design is gothic and foreboding, likely intended to convey a sense of danger or authority. The structure is slender and vertical, with the banner hanging freely from the crossbar.
description: A tall, gothic banner with a tattered red cloth bearing a skull emblem, suspended from a spiked black metal pole with chains and ornate finials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full skull-emblazoned red banner, ornate black pole, and chain details.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the pole and the hanging chain, with the banner barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the skull and tattered banner visible, but less detail on the emblem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the pole and the chain, with minimal visibility of the banner.
attribute_banner_content: skull emblem on tattered red cloth
